exploratory_nl.description: Open natural-language search prompts with lexical ambiguity.

multi_hop.description: Queries whose gold set spans multiple supporting passages.

phrase_sensitive.description: Queries where term dependence or ordered proximity matters.

short_query.description: Very short head queries where exactness and fielding matter.

technical_code_symbol.description: Identifier- or API-symbol-heavy code and implementation queries.

technical_doc.description: Technical documentation and operations-style lexical queries.
